pr_text:
## Title: Fix incorrect pointer type casting in PDCCH Alamouti RX combining

### Summary
The `pdcch_alamouti` function in the LTE UE PHY was using incorrect pointer types for accessing complex-valued channel-compensated data. The function cast `int32_t` arrays (`rxdataF_comp`) to `int16_t*`, causing pointer arithmetic errors and data corruption during Alamouti combining. Specifically, incrementing pointers by 4 `int16_t` elements did not advance to the correct memory location for the next resour
